title: Operations & Program Executive – 12 months contract
description:
We are looking for an Operations & Program Executive to support day-to-day operations, improve internal processes, and help teams work more effectively. This role focuses on coordination, reporting, employee engagement, and supporting internal programs and initiatives.

Key Responsibilities

  • Support smooth daily operations and help improve work processes across teams.
  • Track project progress, performance metrics, and prepare simple reports for transparency. 
  • Handle administrative and coordination tasks to ensure projects run smoothly.     
  • Assist with planning and organizing internal training and skills development programs.
  • Prepare clear documentation, reports, and presentations for internal use.        
  • Coordinate internal and external engagement activities, events, or outreach initiatives.
  • Support ad hoc projects and special assignments as required.    
  • Organize employee engagement activities such as recognition programs, feedback initiatives, and team-building events.

Requirements

  • Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Operations Management, or a related field.
  • 3–7 years of experience in operations, program management, or a similar role.
  • Good understanding of business operations and process improvement.
  • Experience improving workflows or operational efficiency is an advantage.

Skills & Competencies

  • Strong organizational and coordination skills with attention to detail.
  • Good written and verbal communication skills.
  • Able to work well with different teams and stakeholders.
  • Comfortable working with data, tracking trends, and supporting improvements.
  • Experience supporting events, training, or engagement activities.
  • Proficient in Microsoft Office or Google Workspace tools.
  • Familiarity with AI or automation tools is a plus. 

  


  Salary : S$4,000.00 – S$6,000.00

  Location: West (Mapletree Business Park) (Nearest MRT Station : Labrador)

Interested applicants, please submit your application to Teresa.chan@persolapac.com

We regret to inform that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

postedCompany.description:
PERSOL is Asia-Pacific’s leading Staffing and HR solutions partner, operating across 13 markets with deep local insight and regional scale. With more than 80 offices and decades of experience, we deliver integrated workforce solutions that are tailored, tech-enabled, and designed for the dynamic world of work.

We combine human expertise with smart technology to help organisations solve workforce challenges, unlock potential, and stay ahead of change. From recruitment and talent management to workforce strategy and advisory, our collaborative approach puts your goals at the centre.

In 2025, we came together under the PERSOL name — reflecting our bold vision for the future of work and our Group’s Vision: Work and Smile.

Whether you’re building teams, growing careers, or transforming how work gets done, we’re here.
